overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character approaching and entering the Afterlife bar, a neon-lit cyberpunk establishment with industrial architecture. The character transitions from the exterior entrance through a stairwell and corridor into the expansive main bar area with green and cyan neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar entrance with neon signage

events.description: beginning approach to the Afterlife bar entrance from the lower exterior area
character continues walking forward toward the entrance archway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the Afterlife bar entrance through a neon-lit alleyway with cyan and pink lighting

notable_agents.action: NPC standing near the wall on the left side of the entrance
NPC in yellow jacket standing near the right side of the entrance

entered.detail: Large green neon sign reading 'AFTERLIFE' with stylized lettering above the entrance
Bright cyan neon light strips framing the entrance archway
Large circular industrial ventilation fans mounted on the wall above the sign
Metal grated flooring with neon reflections and scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the entrance to the Afterlife bar in a covered alleyway illuminated by vibrant cyan and pink neon lights. The large green 'AFTERLIFE' sign dominates the view ahead, while NPCs stand near the walls observing the surroundings.

events.description: entering the Afterlife bar through the main doorway, transitioning from exterior to interior
lighting shifts from bright neon exterior to dark green-tinted interior

agents.ego_description: entering the bar through the main entrance and ascending the concrete stairs

entered.detail: Doorway emitting green light leading into the dark interior
Concrete staircase leading upward into the bar
Wall covered with posters and graffiti on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character enters the bar through the main doorway, leaving the bright neon exterior behind. The environment becomes dark and enclosed with green ambient lighting as they ascend the concrete stairs into the building.

events.description: entering the main corridor leading to the bar area
continuing forward through the hallway passing NPCs on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial corridor toward the main bar area, passing other patrons

notable_agents.action: NPC in white shirt and blue vest walking along the right side
NPC in red jacket standing against the left wall

entered.detail: Green neon Afterlife sign mounted on the ceiling at the end of the corridor
Large metal pipes running along the right wall of the corridor
Green neon light strips embedded in the metal floor grating
Wall covered in green glowing graffiti and street art
Vending machine with illuminated display on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor illuminated by green neon floor strips and overhead lighting. The corridor features industrial pipes along the walls and graffiti art, with NPCs standing along the sides as the character approaches the main bar area.

scene_state.functional_zone: large cyberpunk bar with curved counter and seating areas

events.description: entering the expansive main bar area from the narrow corridor
turning to explore the right side of the bar near the counter
walking along the bar counter and passing seated patrons

agents.ego_description: exploring the main Afterlife bar area, walking past the curved bar counter and observing patrons in the seating areas

notable_agents.action: Bartender or patron standing at the bar counter on the right
Group of NPCs sitting in the booth seating area on the left

entered.detail: Large curved bar counter with green neon underlighting and stools
Holographic screens and digital displays behind the bar
Enclosed booth seating areas with patrons sitting at tables
Industrial ceiling grid with lighting fixtures and ventilation
Green and cyan neon accent lighting along the floor edges

segments.scene_description: The character enters the expansive main bar area featuring a large curved counter with holographic displays and green neon lighting. The space is filled with NPCs sitting in booth seating and at the bar, while industrial architecture and neon accents create the cyberpunk atmosphere of the Afterlife.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant neon alleyway into the dark, industrial depths of the Afterlife bar. It begins with the character approaching the entrance under a glow of cyan and pink lights, dominated by a large green sign and observing NPCs. As the character steps through the main doorway, the bright exterior fades into a dark, enclosed space where they ascend concrete stairs bathed in green ambient lighting. The scene then shifts into a narrow industrial corridor lined with pipes, graffiti, and neon floor strips before finally opening up into the expansive main bar area. This final space reveals a large curved counter with holographic displays and booths filled with patrons, all set within a cavernous cyberpunk interior of green neon and industrial architecture.
